title: Account - Verbose Logs
description: Use for issues that can not be easily diagnosed.

actions.value:
Could you please send us your logs file?

  1. Go to the main Menu (≡) in the upper right corner, 
  2. Tap Settings, scroll to the bottom 
  3. Find the "Verbose Logging" toggle and turn this on
  4. Select 'Export Logs'
  5. Enter your email address in the notes field to help us identify your log submission.
  6. Tap 'Send Logs to Edge' and reply here with time sent.

 

NOTE: 

  • Logs do not provide any private information such as private key, password, or XPUBS. 
  • Logs do provide some information about your account such as username, device, exchange queries, and EVM addresses.
